text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Focus... Focus on the race ahead...<n>Extreme
close-up on the track!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I have to do my best in the Mile<n>Championship.
It's the highlight of<n>my classic year!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The race is about to start and, for<n>once, Agnes
Digital isn't focused on<n>the other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She's not even focused on her rival<n>for the day,
her beloved King Halo,<n>who she was so worried
about<n>before.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Okay. Let's get to the paddock!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: And when we get there—

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Bang!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Who's the star of the day?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wham!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That's right! It's me! Because I'm...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Shing!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: King Halo! Ohohoho!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: King Halo is there, happily revving up<n>the crowd.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
(Look at King's aura! Look at those<n>smooth,
velvety legs! Look at her<n>vitality!)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: (I knew it... Yes, I knew she could do<n>it...)

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like there was nothing to<n>worry about
after all.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So, Digital, how do I strike you today?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Has my brilliance left you dizzy?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yes, you're the very picture of<n>recovery! There's
none of the<n>imbalance that I sensed in the
summer!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
However, I get the feeling you<n>haven't quite
reached the sleekness<n>you had in the spring...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Don't think you can throw me off<n>with your
weirdly specific<n>observations...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But, tell me, how much do you love<n>me?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
My love for you runs as deep as the<n>Mariana
Trench. And your recent<n>kindness to me has only
intensified<n>my fixation.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two of them smile. While King<n>Halo hasn't
quite made a full<n>comeback, it's clear she's been
making progress moving out of her<n>recent slump.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I've been really looking forward to<n>today, King! I...
I...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I want to get to know the true you in<n>today's race!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh, you don't have to hope. I'll<n>make sure of it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I hope you're prepared to fully<n>embrace the reality
of what it means<n>to be first-rate!
